tasks.label: Scaffold: C++ .h/.cpp/.test.cpp
args:
set -euo pipefail
name="${input:fileBase}"
dir_input="${input:targetDir}"
workspace="${workspaceFolder}"
ns="${input:namespace}"

if [[ -z "$name" ]]; then
  echo "文件名不能为空"
  exit 1
fi

if [[ ! "$name" =~ ^[A-Za-z][A-Za-z0-9_]*$ ]]; then
  echo "文件名仅支持字母/数字/下划线，且必须以字母开头"
  exit 1
fi

if [[ -z "$dir_input" ]]; then
  dir="$workspace"
elif [[ "$dir_input" == /* ]]; then
  dir="$dir_input"
else
  dir="$workspace/$dir_input"
fi

dir=$(realpath -m "$dir")
workspace=$(realpath -m "$workspace")
mkdir -p "$dir"

rel_dir="$dir"
if [[ "$dir" == "$workspace"/* ]]; then
  rel_dir="${dir#$workspace/}"
fi

if [[ -z "$ns" ]]; then
  if [[ "$rel_dir" == xin/* ]]; then
    ns="${rel_dir////::}"
  else
    ns="xin"
  fi
fi

h="$dir/$name.h"
cpp="$dir/$name.cpp"
test="$dir/$name.test.cpp"

for f in "$h" "$cpp" "$test"; do
  if [[ -e "$f" ]]; then
    echo "文件已存在: $f"
    echo "未覆盖已有文件，请换名后重试"
    exit 2
  fi
done

guard_name=$(echo "$name" | tr "[:lower:]" "[:upper:]")
guard="XIN_${guard_name}_H"

cat > "$h" <<EOF
#ifndef $guard
#define $guard

namespace $ns {

} // namespace $ns

#endif // $guard
EOF

cat > "$cpp" <<EOF
#include "$name.h"

namespace $ns {

} // namespace $ns
EOF

cat > "$test" <<EOF
#include "$name.h"

#include <doctest/doctest.h>
EOF

echo "已生成文件:"
echo "- $h"
echo "- $cpp"
echo "- $test"

inputs.description: 输入文件基名（例如 redis_bitmap）
输入生成目录（支持绝对路径；相对路径将基于当前项目根目录）
